free_text: PRODUCTION OF P-32 AND P-33 FROM VARIOUS TARGETS WITH
AT AN ENERGY OF 550 MEV THE BEAM WAS BELIEVED TO HAVE
THE TARGET ARRANGEMENTS CONSISTED OF THREE STACKS OF
FOILS; EACH STACK CONSISTED OF A 2-MIL FRONT AND BACK
AL GUARD FOIL, A 1-MIL FRONT AND BACK AL MONITOR FOIL
AND FOUR TARGET-ELEMENT FOILS SEPARATED BY 1-MIL AL
NO ERR-ANALYSIS WAS GIVEN IN DETAIL.
